description: Evaluation cases for NLM Podcast skill

test_cases.name: Principiante intro - tema simple
test_cases.input: Hazme un podcast sobre qué es machine learning para alguien que no sabe nada
assertions: Focus prompt contains {TOPIC} replaced with ML concept
Post-generation report is presented to user

test_cases.name: Ejecutivo briefing - decisión tecnológica
test_cases.input: Necesito un audio corto para mi jefe sobre por qué deberíamos migrar a Kubernetes
assertions: Focus prompt uses Minto structure (conclusion first)

test_cases.name: Experto debate - tema de frontera
test_cases.input: Create a long debate podcast about LLM reasoning capabilities vs traditional symbolic AI for my research group
assertions: Language detected as English from input
Focus prompt includes tension and open questions sections

test_cases.name: Existing notebook - direct generation
assertions: Runs pre-generation checklist on existing notebook

test_cases.name: Team alignment - equipo
test_cases.input: Genera un podcast para alinear a mi equipo de desarrollo sobre la nueva arquitectura de microservicios
assertions: Focus prompt includes team discussion questions

test_cases.name: Intermediate comparison - debate format
test_cases.input: Quiero un podcast comparando React vs Vue para alguien que ya sabe JavaScript
assertions: Focus prompt includes steel-man for both positions

test_cases.name: Motivational hook - principiante
test_cases.input: Dame un audio cortito y motivador sobre por qué aprender a programar en 2026
assertions: Detects audience=principiante from topic and tone
Focus prompt emphasizes curiosity over teaching

test_cases.name: Custom meta-prompt - no matrix match
test_cases.input: Hazme un podcast estilo storytelling sobre la historia del internet para adolescentes de 15 años
assertions: No exact PM-XX match — falls to meta-prompt
Meta-prompt generates custom focus with storytelling structure
Audience calibrated to adolescentes (not standard levels)

test_cases.name: Generation failure recovery
assertions: Suggests reducing sources if retry also fails
Reports failure clearly to user with recovery options
